scripts.format:check: pnpm exec prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.scripts.json README.md AGENTS.md PRINCIPLES.md docs/**/*.md infra/README.md infra/AGENTS.md infra/local/compose.yaml .github/workflows/deployment_pipeline.yml .github/workflows/README.md scripts/**/*.ts apps/ade-api/AGENTS.md apps/ade-api/package.json apps/ade-api/src/**/*.ts apps/ade-api/test/**/*.ts apps/ade-web/AGENTS.md apps/ade-web/package.json apps/ade-web/src/**/*.tsx apps/ade-web/vite.config.ts apps/ade-web/tsconfig*.json packages/ade-config/README.md packages/ade-engine/README.md
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.scripts.json && pnpm --filter @ade/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @ade/web typecheck
scripts.test:python: uv run --directory packages/ade-engine --with pytest pytest && uv run --directory packages/ade-config --with pytest pytest
scripts.package:python: uv build --directory packages/ade-engine && uv build --directory packages/ade-config
scripts.test: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:python && pnpm package:python && pnpm build
